name: Miss Hulling's Potato Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes and grate or run through a fine food chopper.
2. Add the remaining ingredients to the grated potatoes and mix until well combined.
3. Heat shortening in a skillet so that it is about 1/4-inch deep.
4. Spoon pancake batter into the hot fat.
5. Cook the pancakes, turning once, until they are brown on one side.
6. Turn the pancakes over and cook until brown on the other side.
7. Drain excess oil onto paper towel or cloth before serving.
8. Serve the pancakes hot with applesauce.
Helpful Hint: The amount of flour needed may vary depending on the water content of the potatoes used.
